Lucas Dewey
Experience Contact

Portfolio

Experience

2024-Present

Omnicell, Inc.

Senior Mechanical Design Engineer

Leading mechanical design and R&D for next-generation medical hardware platforms, spanning secure access systems, subsystem packaging, and platform-level mechanical improvements from concept through validation and ECO release.

2022-2023

BrightDrop (General Motors)

Senior Mechanical Design Engineer

Led mechanical and electromechanical development for electric delivery cart and van platforms, spanning caster brake systems, structural validation, sealed electronics enclosures, cabling interfaces, and grocery temperature-control concepts from early R&D through prototype validation.

2019-2022

Lawrence Livermore National Lab

Mechanical Engineer - Product Realization

Designed, analyzed, tested, and released stainless steel and polymer components for DOE program hardware at LLNL, supporting forged, machined, additively manufactured, and molded part development from design trade studies through first-article production, inspection, and qualification.

2018-2018

Zyris

Product Design Engineer

Resolved manufacturing, assembly, and field-use issues on the Isolite Pro dental medical device, an electromechanical illuminated isolation system with integrated LEDs and connectivity. Work focused on improving molded part fit, sealing reliability, cleanability, assembly quality, and production test support during early customer deployment.

2017-2018

TrackR

R&D Mechanical Engineer

Concepted and prototyped Bluetooth tracking integrations for the Works with TrackR program, creating partner-facing product mockups and improving TrackR hardware accessories through injection molded part design, prototyping, and cross-functional collaboration.

2016-2017

Lifestyle Design

Mechanical Engineer

Designed and prototyped consumer products at Lifestyle Design across molded plastic, sheet metal, electronics enclosures, and structural assemblies. Work spanned early concept development, engineering design, analysis, prototype refinement, production drawings, and running changes for products already in market.

© Lucas Dewey. Portfolio content is limited to public or non-confidential work. Confidential project details, implementation specifics, and proprietary visuals are intentionally omitted.
